推荐场景: 酒店前台｜办理入住并核对房间信息
60秒任务: 「入住」：A2出门信息综合；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: A2场景综合｜多信息抓取｜简单故事｜任务迁移
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜综合服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I have a hotel booking.（酒店预订）
Can I check in now?（入住）
Here is my passport.（证件）
The booking is under ___.（预订姓名）
What is my room number?（房号）
Does the key card work?（房卡确认）
Breakfast starts at ___.（早餐时间）
Can I leave my bags here?（寄存行李）
The room is not ready.（房间未好）
I booked two nights.（入住晚数）
Could you repeat that, please?（重复）
The elevator is over there.（电梯）
I need Wi-Fi.（网络需求）
The room is quiet.（房间评价）
Thank you for your help.（感谢）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: booking, passport, room, key card, breakfast, bag, elevator, Wi-Fi, hotel, night
Verbs: check in, book, leave, repeat, start, work, need, help
Adjectives: ready, quiet, included, over there, two
Time / Place: now, here, at the front desk, tonight, tomorrow
Chunks: booking under, room number, key card, leave bags, two nights
